hubspot.note: Get private app token from HubSpot Settings > Integrations > Private Apps

salesforce.note: Run 'sf org display --target-org <alias>' to get these values

execution.note_dryRun: Set to false to execute. Always test in sandbox first!
execution.note_autoAssociate: CRITICAL: Must be OFF in HubSpot during cleanup
execution.note_idempotency: Automatically replaced with timestamp on execution

canonicalWeights.note_syncHealth: NEW: Sync recency + object source validation (production-validated)
canonicalWeights.note: Higher weight = higher priority. Total possible: 230 points (enhanced from 180)
